mapper.select: SELECT idempotency_key, user_id, request_hash, reference_id, status, error_code, response_snapshot, created_at, updated_at, retry_count, locked_until FROM idempotency_keys WHERE idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey}

SELECT idempotency_key, user_id, request_hash, reference_id, status, error_code, response_snapshot, created_at, updated_at, retry_count, locked_until FROM idempotency_keys WHERE reference_id = #{referenceId}

SELECT idempotency_key, user_id, request_hash, reference_id, status, error_code, response_snapshot, created_at, updated_at, retry_count, locked_until FROM idempotency_keys WHERE request_hash = #{requestHash} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('INIT', 'PENDING', 'OTP_OVER_LIMIT') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM idempotency_keys WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('INIT','PENDING')
